name: Discover it Cash Back
signup_bonus: Unlimited Cashback Match for first year
perks: 5% cash back on rotating quarterly categories (up to $1,500 per quarter, then 1%) - gas, groceries, Amazon, restaurants, and more
Cashback Match: Discover doubles all cash back earned at the end of the first year
0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 months
Free Social Security number alerts and FICO score monitoring
No penalty APR for late payments
drawbacks: Discover not as widely accepted internationally as Visa or Mastercard
